securityPage.metaDescription: Learn how EdgeRent Lite handles access control, file uploads, driver license retention, audit logging, and deployment-side operational practices.
securityPage.title: How EdgeRent Lite handles security, privacy, and operational controls
securityPage.intro: This page describes the controls that are implemented in the product today and the operational topics we discuss with clients during deployment. We avoid broad security claims and focus on what is actually in place.

access.title: Controlled admin access
access.description: Admin access is protected by authenticated sessions and role-based permissions for ROOT, OWNER, and STAFF users.

uploads.title: Validated file uploads
uploads.description: Driver-license uploads are limited by file type, file size, and basic file-signature validation before storage.

retention.title: Retention controls
retention.description: Uploaded driver-license files are scheduled for deletion 30 days after the rental end date.

audit.title: Operational audit trail
audit.description: Administrative actions can be written to audit logs so booking and management changes can be reviewed later.

securityPage.controlsTitle: Controls implemented in the current product

identity.title: Password handling
identity.body: Admin passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes. Plain-text passwords are not stored in the application database.

sessions.title: Authenticated sessions
sessions.body: Admin sessions are issued as signed tokens with a 24-hour expiration. Session cookies are httpOnly, use sameSite=lax, and are marked secure in production.

uploads.title: Upload validation
uploads.body: License uploads accept JPG, PNG, and PDF only, enforce an 8 MB size limit, and validate file signatures before the file is accepted.

storage.title: Private file storage
storage.body: Sensitive uploaded files are stored in private blob storage and served through an application proxy instead of being exposed as public assets.

retention.title: Driver-license retention
retention.body: Driver-license files are assigned a delete-after date and a protected cleanup job removes them after the retention window expires.

audit.title: Audit and evidence
audit.body: The platform stores operational timestamps such as terms acceptance, pickup and return events, and can record admin actions in audit logs.

securityPage.operationsTitle: Topics handled as part of deployment and business operations

backup.title: Backups
backup.body: Backup schedules and retention are deployment-specific. For each client environment, backup expectations should be agreed and documented at the infrastructure level.

recovery.title: Recovery and restoration
recovery.body: Recovery procedures, restore testing, and service-level expectations should be defined per deployment so the client knows the actual restore path for their environment.

sidebar.title: Client-friendly security conversations
sidebar.description: When clients ask about cybersecurity, we recommend discussing verified controls, retention rules, access management, and the documented backup policy for their deployment.

points.one: Role-based admin access helps limit who can see and manage operational data.
points.two: Sensitive uploads are private and have a defined retention rule.
points.three: Terms acceptance and operational events are recorded for traceability.
points.four: Backup and disaster-recovery commitments should be confirmed per environment in writing.

core.title: Everything you need to run your rental business
core.description: EdgeRent keeps bookings, fleet operations, pickups, returns, and billing under control in one professional system. From online reservations to QuickBooks Online and Zoho Invoice integrations, it is built for serious rental teams.

onlineBooking.description: Give customers a professional booking flow with live availability, pricing, and instant reservation capture from any device.

noDoubleBooking.title: No Double Booking
noDoubleBooking.description: Real-time availability checks with transaction-based allocation. Every vehicle is booked only once per time slot.

vehicleManagement.description: Complete fleet dashboard with status tracking for active, on-rent, maintenance, and inactive vehicles.

vehicleBlocking.title: Vehicle Blocking
vehicleBlocking.description: Block vehicles for maintenance, repairs, or reservations so unavailable units never appear in customer searches.

pickupReturn.title: Pickup & Return Tracking
pickupReturn.description: Manage delivery dates, return dates, locations, and operational handoffs with the visibility your team needs every day.

adminOperations.title: Full Admin Dashboard
adminOperations.description: Track bookings, deliveries, returns, payments, reviews, and fleet activity from one operational control center.

accounting.title: QuickBooks Online & Zoho Invoice
accounting.description: Accounting integrations support invoice and customer sync so your finance workflow stays connected to daily rental operations.

extended.title: Built for real rental operations
extended.description: Every feature is designed around actual rental workflows in the Caribbean.

licenseUpload.title: License Upload & Validation
licenseUpload.description: Secure private blob storage with expiry checks

tenantBranding.description: Your logo, colors, and contact info everywhere

flexiblePricing.title: Flexible Pricing
flexiblePricing.description: Daily rates, extras, discount codes, and tax

whyUs.title: Built by operators,
whyUs.description: We understand the unique challenges of running a rental business in the Dutch Caribbean. EdgeRent was designed from the ground up for this market.

caribbean.description: Designed specifically for rental businesses in Curaçao, Aruba, and Bonaire with local workflows and multi-currency support.

reliability.description: Transaction-based booking prevents overbookings. Proper hold management and overlap checks protect your fleet.

branding.title: Your Business, Your Brand
branding.description: Single-tenant architecture keeps your data isolated and your branding visible across every customer touchpoint.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.description: Direct line to the development team with rental-specific product knowledge.
